adapter.notes: Adapter behavior for missing schema, missing runs, rerun selection, unsupported contract versions, duplicate identities, and pre-split review_state absence is executable-tested in game-capture-compat-repo.test.ts and map-live-capture.test.ts; no production adapter execution occurred for this report.

interpretation: Every one of the 42 historical games is legacy-only: imported before the v2 cutoff by the live site's manual-web-import-v2 parser, with server-derived input hashes present on all 42 imports.
The v2 capture stores are deployed and empty: no real post-cutoff import has occurred yet (the deployment's throwaway verification game was removed).
All 42 games carry historical_parser_verified_owner_confirmed_absent for both mechanics with null final Venus (never zero) from the authorized 42-row backfill.
No duplicate source hashes, event identities, or placement identities exist in either system.
No unsupported v2 contract versions were observed.
